sourceSummary.oneLine: TP-Link quick installation guide for a wireless router with setup instructions, safety information, and EU conformity declaration text.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as manufacturer installation, safety, and EU conformity reference content for the wireless router.
keyPoints: The guide describes hardware connection and initial configuration through a web browser.
The TP-Link Tether app is described as a way to access and manage the router.
Safety information instructs users to keep the device away from water, fire, humidity, and hot environments.
TP-Link declares the device complies with directives 2014/53/EU, 2009/125/EC, 2011/65/EU, and (EU)2015/863.
The original EU declaration of conformity is stated to be available at https://www.tp-link.com/en/ce.

entities.name: TP-Link Tether
entities.evidence: The TP-Link Tether app provides a simple, intuitive way to access and manage your router.

entities.name: European Union
entities.evidence: The original EU declaration of conformity may be found at https://www.tp-link.com/en/ce.

concepts.name: EU Declaration of Conformity
concepts.evidence: The original EU declaration of conformity may be found at https://www.tp-link.com/en/ce.

concepts.name: Safety Information
concepts.evidence: Please read and follow the above safety information when operating the device.

concepts.name: Directive 2014/53/EU
concepts.evidence: TP-Link hereby declares that the device is in compliance with the essential requirements and other relevant provisions of directives 2014/53/EU, 2009/125/EC, 2011/65/EU and (EU)2015/863.

concepts.name: Directive 2009/125/EC
concepts.evidence: TP-Link hereby declares that the device is in compliance with the essential requirements and other relevant provisions of directives 2014/53/EU, 2009/125/EC, 2011/65/EU and (EU)2015/863.

concepts.name: Directive 2011/65/EU
concepts.evidence: TP-Link hereby declares that the device is in compliance with the essential requirements and other relevant provisions of directives 2014/53/EU, 2009/125/EC, 2011/65/EU and (EU)2015/863.

concepts.name: Directive (EU) 2015/863
concepts.evidence: TP-Link hereby declares that the device is in compliance with the essential requirements and other relevant provisions of directives 2014/53/EU, 2009/125/EC, 2011/65/EU and (EU)2015/863.

evidence.claim: The document is a quick installation guide for a wireless router.
The document identifies TP-Link and revision REV2.3.1.
evidence.pageTarget: TP-Link Wireless Router Quick Installation Guide REV2.3.1

evidence.claim: The guide instructs users to configure the router through a web browser using tplinkwifi.net or 192.168.0.1.
evidence.evidenceText: Enter http://tplinkwifi.net or http://192.168.0.1 in the address bar of a web browser.

evidence.claim: The TP-Link Tether app provides access and management functions for the router.
evidence.evidenceText: The TP-Link Tether app provides a simple, intuitive way to access and manage your router.

evidence.claim: The safety information says to keep the device away from water, fire, humidity, or hot environments.
evidence.evidenceText: Keep the device away from water, fire, humidity or hot environments.

evidence.claim: The safety information says not to disassemble, repair, or modify the device.
evidence.evidenceText: Do not attempt to disassemble, repair, or modify the device.

evidence.claim: The safety information says the adapter must be installed near the equipment and be easily accessible.
evidence.evidenceText: Adapter shall be installed near the equipment and shall be easily accessible.

evidence.claim: TP-Link declares the device complies with EU directives 2014/53/EU, 2009/125/EC, 2011/65/EU, and (EU)2015/863.
evidence.evidenceText: TP-Link hereby declares that the device is in compliance with the essential requirements and other relevant provisions of directives 2014/53/EU, 2009/125/EC, 2011/65/EU and (EU)2015/863.

evidence.claim: The original EU declaration of conformity is stated to be available on TP-Link's CE webpage.
evidence.evidenceText: The original EU declaration of conformity may be found at https://www.tp-link.com/en/ce.

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit product model is present in the source text; the source path mentions Archer C64, but the document text only states Wireless Router.
No explicit document date is stated; ©2021 appears as copyright text but was not treated as a document date.
Authority is indirect: the source contains a manufacturer EU conformity declaration, but no issuing regulator or notified body is identified.
